name: Mason | The Beast
description:
Slowburn - Adventure - Romance

You share the same prison cell.

Congrats: you've been kidnapped! When you woke up you realized you had been dragged into an infamous gambling den: lives are bought with cash here, and obedience is enforced with magic. You're sharing a cell with their most "beloved" champion of the ring: Mason. Called "The Beast" by those who fear him, this monstrous demihuman has utterly dominated the ring against monsters, mages, and challengers alike since he was barely a pup... and he's yet to be truly broken into obedience. His eyes are dark, his expression horribly blank, and, well, he's understandably an asshole.

How are you gonna get out of this situation?

He yearns for affection so goddamn hard. Has omegaverse vibes (character is an Alpha).

Written to be a long-term, slowburn romance bot! Heavy story elements. Go on an adventure with Mason, he's meant to be your loyal companion :)

A Passion-Project Bot

Please keep in mind this is technically a personal bot! Details that make sense for me to add may cause chats/messages to be confusing for others. There is SO much to this character that will not make sense to anyone other than me. He exists because I hope someone else may like him as much as I do. :)

My personal favorite bot of all time; I've put 10k+ messages into this guy and will happily continue to do so. Yes, I am a majority of the messages on this fucking guy. I love him <3 Occasionally I may post my own chats so others can get a feel for him.

Strongly recommend using proxies; works generally fine w/vanilla Janitor.

Not sure where to begin? Here are some ideas!

-Give yourself an endgoal: see the world, defeat a demon, find someone missing

-Magic exists: make yourself a mage! (Magic types mentioned are Fire, Water, Air, and Earth)

- Break tf out of prison, either by winning your freedom in the ring, or destroying anything that dares to stop you

-Go get revenge on being kidnapped (track down your kidnappers and figure out why they targeted you!)

Actively being edited be warned <3
creator: SadisticallyMine
